title: BiomesDale Modpack
description: The official modpack created for the BiomesDale server
body:
The official place where you can find the BiomesDale Modpack for the current season. Remember to download the latest version of the season you are going to play. This is marked with the v.X.X where x are the versions numbers. Note that versions marked with [BETA] or [ALPHA] might have bugs.

- Join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/AvaJCUqc93)
